_comment: Branching logic rules for the DWI Path tool. Implemented in js/branching-engine.js.

toneRules.description: Test refusal + multiple priors = felony territory — maximum urgency
Test refusal alone triggers dual criminal/civil consequences
Multiple priors mean felony charges and mandatory minimums
Second DWI = gross misdemeanor with elevated penalties
First offense has the best range of outcomes with proper representation

roadmapActivation.license: testType AND (refusal OR arrested OR has_priors)

refusal.description: Test refusal triggers a separate criminal charge AND civil revocation

firstOffense.description: First offense has the broadest range of outcomes — focus on preserving options

multiplePriors.description: Third+ DWI within 10 years = felony with mandatory 180-day minimum

olmstedCounty.description: We know Olmsted County Third Judicial District — local advantage

blueEarthCounty.description: Blue Earth County Fifth Judicial District — Mankato
